So recently, it was about a month ago, some guy sent me a message and he goes, Stephen, why are you so high energy all the time? And actually some of you have asked me that here today. Or yes, last night, you're like, I love the energy, keep it up. And someone would say, why are you so high energy? Why are you so high energy? And a lot of you guys know, where's Nick? Where are you Nick? Is Nick here? There you go. Boom. So I'm in the Army, right? Nick has military past, right? That's his niche as well. And a lot of it stems from when I was in basic training. And, you know, I had this drill sergeant. Other drill sergeants called him the dragon. He was that freaky. I would walk in and this dude was huge. Total, quintessential Hollywood, you know, like massive guy. I mean, he would walk in and just start throwing crap. And he'd pick up all of our stuff and just throw it all over the room and be like, what are you guys doing? You're worth nothing, you know? And I went to basic in February, which is like the worst time to go, because there's snow everywhere and they put you in shorts and t-shirt and they totally take advantage of it, right? And so you're out there in shorts and t-shirt and it's raining ice. And I was like, oh, this is amazing. I love the Army, Long Live Merca, you know? And I remember specifically one time there was just tons and tons of rain coming down, tons of it, and it started snowing. And there was so much that there was an ice storm that came in. And there were puddles of water all over the place. And we were practicing running into areas and taking over spots, which means you're in the prone a lot, you're laying down. And so I was running out, running out, and they're like, you got to go run down over here. You got to go run down over here. And I look where they say that I need to go sit down and it's 33 degrees. It's almost freezing. There's a puddle of water that's about six inches high. And I was like, okay. So I jumped in the water and immediately your body just goes into shock. Right. You think about where's Anthony? It's like the cryos thing that you guys torture me with, you know? Like, oh, this is amazing. And this kid next to me just starts freaking out. This is awful. If you already have a webinar, you can just do it live. But once you get it going, and I just literally figured this out yesterday is like for some reason, our cost of acquisition. kept going up over like the last couple of weeks. And I couldn't figure it out. And I because the way you said it on Facebook is you set top comments to show up and then you comment on all the best testimonies and they roll to the top, right? Like you do that on your ads anyway. But like what I realized is that when people watch the live and they pull it full screen, like they see the ad, they click it, they watch it. It'll insert the comments of people like afterwards at any point, like whatever point during the live stream they watched it, it puts their comment. And so we just had a bunch of hater comments. So basically you just sit there, you click it on like live comments and then you watch them and we deleted 700 negative comments. And the cost of acquisition went from $90 to $50. So like, and so like hopefully it gets better because it just we just started. Yeah. So this is like, you know, this is weeks after it's been running because it's just on auto right now. And and like literally cut the conversion cost in half because like you just delete all the hater comments out of it because that influence of what they're reading while they're watching you and what everyone else is saying is like the reason they buy, I think. So I have an ad guy, so I just told him to go through and delete it. I think it took him like two hours, but like it was like if it's bad, delete it and just the comment moderation. Yeah. I'm so excited to have you guys here today. Now, today, what we're going to be covering is something that most people don't even think is possible. And I'm guessing that you probably saw the headline before you got on here. Probably that's not really possible, but you're curious, right? Like, you want to find out what in the world this is even about, right? If that's true, this is the title. It's how my 15-year-old sold $100,000, $270,000 in just nine short months, and how you and your kids can actually do it, too. Now, how many of you guys would love to have your kids, instead of like bugging you and you know, begging you for money, or actually producing money? How many of you guys want that for your kids? OK. Now, that's the first thing I'm going to be covering. Now, what's interesting about this is the way the whole thing started is that my goal was never for me or for my kids to be like entrepreneurs. I do things entrepreneurially. Like, I love having businesses and things, but one day my daughter was sitting there and she wanted, she wasn't cleaning the house. She wasn't even at home working. It's kind of frustrating to me. I said, look, you've got two options. One is you're going to move out and you're going to be gone out of my life. Number two is you've got to do your homework and clean up your room. Number three, you've got to start a business. You can pick whichever one you want.
